name: Ranch Flavored Pasta Primavera
recipeIngredient: 1 package Hidden Valley Original-Ranch Salad Dressing Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rotelle pasta until al dente, then drain.
2. In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
3. Add the Hidden Valley Ranch Salad Dressing Mix and stir to combine.
4. Stir in the thawed vegetable medley.
5. Heat everything together until thoroughly heated through.
6. Serve immediately.
